purpose: Static, read-only portfolio control center for tracking NYCIF repositories as one master project.
security_note: This file is published through a public GitHub Pages site. Do not include secrets, private operational data, unpublished credentials, tokens, or sensitive private repo contents.

recommended_secure_options: Cloudflare Access in front of a custom admin domain
Netlify password protection or identity gate
Private internal dashboard outside GitHub Pages

master_project.name: NYCIF Master Project
master_project.next_action: Review repo roles, define per-project completion metrics, then decide secure hosting/auth approach.

projects.name: nycif-web-platform
projects.next_action: Confirm scope, live destination, build/deploy model, and status artifacts.

projects.name: nycif-field-desk
projects.role: Field Desk public/admin dashboard, event-source cockpit, XRI admin surface
projects.next_action: Use as current master admin host while secure admin hosting is evaluated.

projects.name: nycif-prompt-engine
projects.role: Prompt/SOP engine and editorial workflow memory
projects.next_action: Define which prompt packs, QA gates, and SOPs should publish safe status summaries.

projects.name: nycif-event-radar
projects.next_action: Define feed status, source coverage, alert surfaces, and privacy-safe summary fields.

projects.name: nycif-live-feeds
projects.next_action: Define feed freshness, failure states, source ownership, and public/private boundaries.

projects.name: nycif-data-pipeline
projects.next_action: Define pipeline stages, test reports, source freshness metrics, and safe summary exports.

projects.name: nycif-open-data
projects.next_action: Define dataset catalog, update cadence, and public data provenance summaries.

non_goals_v1: No live GitHub API polling from public page.
No password or secret stored in JavaScript.
